metaDescription: Need emergency boiler repair in London and Sussex? Call for urgent help with no heating, no hot water, leaks and boiler faults from a local Gas Safe engineer.
h1: Emergency Boiler Repair in London and Sussex
intro: If your boiler has failed without warning, you have no heating or hot water, or water is leaking from the appliance, we provide emergency boiler repair support across London and Sussex.
pricingGuidance: Emergency boiler repair is priced from an urgent diagnostic call-out, with any major parts or follow-up work explained before approval.
localProof: Called for urgent breakdowns across London and Sussex when heating failure or water leaks need a fast response and a sensible repair plan.

sections.heading: When a boiler fault is an emergency
sections.body: An urgent call-out makes sense when you have no heating, no hot water, a leak from the appliance or a boiler that will not safely stay running.

sections.heading: What we prioritise on an urgent visit
sections.body: The first priority is safety and fault diagnosis. Once the immediate problem is identified, we explain whether it can be repaired on the spot or whether parts and follow-up are needed.

sections.heading: Fast response without rushed advice
sections.body: Urgent situations still need proper diagnosis. We focus on practical next steps rather than guessing at a repair when the fault needs a closer look.
